_schema.description: Character co-occurrence network from a fictional novel. Each node is a character; each link records how many scenes two characters share.

fields.nodes[].id: string — unique identifier, matches source/target in links
fields.nodes[].label: string — display name shown on the axis
fields.nodes[].totalScenes: number — total scenes this character appears in (drives node radius)
fields.links[].source: string — id of first character in the pair
fields.links[].target: string — id of second character in the pair
fields.links[].weight: number — shared scene count (drives arc thickness and color)

_schema.replace: Swap nodes[] with your entities (people, words, documents) and links[] with co-occurrence counts. Keep id values consistent between nodes and links.
